notes:
**Federation Stage 2 — shared projects that stay in sync.**

This release finishes the big federation hardening push: subscribers can edit shared tasks and milestones through the Leader when connected, reconnect cleanly after outages, and get warned before claiming against an incompatible server. Collaboration settings moved to their own section; managed sign-ins survive app restarts.

Also fixes clicking a task's priority dot or a row icon on **Summary** and **Related** panels — they now focus the row instead of doing nothing (or jumping straight to the detail page).

Desktop + managed server image **0.23.0**. Existing installs: **Keen → Check for Updates** or Settings → Updates. Keen Cloud users: the app can roll your server automatically when you update.

## Install

| Platform | Artifact |
|---|---|
| Apple Silicon | `Keen_0.23.0_aarch64.dmg` |
| Intel Mac | `Keen_0.23.0_x64.dmg` |
